Key Business Leaders: Bin Li, Lihong Qin, William Li
Recent News: NIO is launching an aggressive product offensive in 2026, including the flagship ES9 SUV and the Onvo L80 vehicle. The company is also integrating AI into operations, highlighted by the development of the Shenji NX9031 5nm AI processor.
AI/ML Adoption Level: High; employees are encouraged to embed AI deeply into operations; developed in-house 5nm AI processor (Shenji NX9031).
Focus Sectors / Industries: Smart electric vehicles, robotics, AI processors
Company safety policies: NIO maintains effective safety programs for workers, emergency preparedness, and precautions regarding hazardous substances.
Intellectual Property: Shenji NX9031 5nm AI processor with over 50 billion transistors.
Tech Stack/Tools Used: Smart electric vehicle technology stack, robotics, supply chain management, and internal management systems.
Exposure quality: Great place for interns to learn and get hands-on experience.
Diversity Metrics: 45% women, 55% men; Ethnicity: 39% White, 28% Asian, 19% Hispanic or Latino.
Strategic Priorities: Unlocking profitability and shareholder value through aggressive product innovation, infrastructure advancements, and global expansion.
Innovation Roadmap: Focus on AI integration, in-house 5nm AI processor (Shenji NX9031) with 1,000+ TOPS computing power, and expansion of mass-market brand Onvo.
Work culture: Fast-paced, requiring employees to keep up; provides good opportunities for interns to gain hands-on experience.
Overview of the Company: NIO is a smart electric vehicle company that provides power solutions, including home charging, power express valet services, and public charging access. The company is focused on premium and mass-market segments, with a strong emphasis on AI integration and technology-driven vehicle development.
Key Competitors: Nvidia (in AI/computing context), other EV manufacturers in China's automotive market.
Values: Honesty and integrity in all situations; good judgment and expertise serve as an internal compass for decision-making.
Services / Offerings / Products: Electric vehicles (ES9, Onvo L80), power solutions (home charging, power express valet, public charging), Shenji NX9031 AI chip.
